avertissement.title: Disclaimer
avertissement.intro: By using this website or signing up to use our services, you explicitly agree to all of the following.

blocks.text: [COMPANY NAME], operating the Way of Trading website and application ("WOT", "we", "the Company"), together with its managers, employees, successors and assigns, does not guarantee or warrant the accuracy, completeness or reliability of the website, its content or the services provided, including any information from third-party sources. By accessing our services, you release the Company from any liability, damages or injury arising from the information contained herein. You acknowledge that you are solely responsible for any financial outcome resulting from your decisions, and you agree to conduct your own research.

The Company is not registered or licensed by any governing body, in any jurisdiction, to provide investment advice or recommendations. We are not registered as a securities broker-dealer, broker, investment advisor or investment advisor representative with any securities regulatory authority or any self-regulatory organization. Our services are for educational and informational purposes only. It is essential that you conduct your own research and consult a licensed professional before making any investment decision.

The content and services provided through WOT (lessons, glossary, quizzes, calculators, economic calendar, analyzers, AI coach) are intended solely for educational and informational purposes. They do not constitute personalized investment advice. We cannot assess, verify or guarantee the suitability or profitability of any instrument, strategy or decision. Our services do not provide advice or recommendations tailored to your personal financial situation. The Company disclaims any liability for losses arising from actions taken in reliance on its services.

All investing and trading involve significant risk, including the total loss of the capital committed. CFDs, Forex and leveraged products are particularly risky: a significant proportion of retail client accounts lose money. You may lose some, all, or more than your capital. You are solely responsible for your own research and decisions. Our information is only a starting point for your own independent research. Trading with money you cannot afford to lose is strongly discouraged. We recommend seeking advice from a licensed professional and educating yourself thoroughly before making any decision.

Any reference to past performance does not indicate or guarantee future results. Projections, numerical examples or scenarios shown are hypothetical and educational in nature; they do not predict actual results and must not be relied upon as indicators of future performance. Your actual results may differ materially from any example shown.

sections.heading: Artificial Intelligence (Coach Rudy and analysis tools)

blocks.text: Our services include artificial-intelligence tools, in particular the AI coach "Rudy", a chart analyzer and a trade analyzer. You acknowledge and agree that: (a) these tools operate solely as software for educational purposes and exercise no decision-making power over any trading account; (b) WOT does not connect to any brokerage account, does not place, modify or cancel any order, and does not execute any operation on your behalf; (c) any content, analysis, educational signals or parameters are general in nature, provided on the same basis to all users, and are not tailored to your situation, holdings or personal objectives; (d) artificial-intelligence outputs are probabilistic, may be inaccurate or incomplete, and may not account for sudden market events; (e) you are solely responsible for how you use these analyses and for any decision resulting from them. The Company does not guarantee the performance, availability or uninterrupted operation of these tools, and disclaims any liability for losses arising from their use or malfunction.

WOT may present or mention partner brokers (including RaiseFX, IronFX, VT Markets, Vantage) and may receive affiliate compensation when you open an account or make a deposit with these partners through our links. This compensation comes at no additional cost to you. The presence of a broker on WOT does not constitute a recommendation, a guarantee, or advice to open an account with them. Your relationship with any broker, the opening of an account, deposits and the execution of orders are governed solely by that broker's own terms. The Company is not responsible for the acts, omissions or availability of any third-party broker, nor for the funds you entrust to them.
By continuing to use the WOT website and application, you acknowledge that you have read, understood and accepted this disclaimer in its entirety.

The controller of the data collected through the Way of Trading website and application is [COMPANY NAME], [LEGAL FORM], with its registered office at [ADDRESS], [COUNTRY]. For any question regarding your data, you may contact us at: support@wayoftrading.com.
We collect the following data:

items: **Data you provide directly.** When you use the contact form: your name, email address and the content of your message. When you join the launch waitlist: your email address and your chosen language.

**Data collected automatically (with your consent).** When you accept analytics cookies, we collect usage data via Google Analytics: pages viewed, visit duration, device type, traffic source, approximate location (country/region). This data is collected in aggregate form and does not identify you by name.

**Account data (application).** When the application becomes available and you create an account, we will process the data necessary to provide the service (login credentials, learning progress, preferences). [TO BE COMPLETED at application launch.]

blocks.text: We use your data to: respond to your requests via the contact form; inform you of the application launch and deliver the benefits promised when you signed up early; measure and improve the website's audience and experience; ensure the security of the site and prevent abuse.

Processing is based on your **consent** (given by submitting a form or accepting cookies) and on our **legitimate interest** in securing and improving our services. You may withdraw your consent at any time.

Your data may be processed by the following technical providers acting as processors: Google (Google Analytics, audience measurement), [HOSTING: Vercel Inc.], our automation and email provider (self-hosted n8n / email provider). **We do not sell or rent your data to commercial third parties.**

We keep your data for as long as necessary for the purposes described: contact messages for as long as needed to handle your request; waitlist emails until launch and delivery of the benefit, then [RETENTION PERIOD TO BE DEFINED] unless you object; analytics data according to the retention period configured in Google Analytics.

Some of our providers (notably Google) may process data outside the European Union. Such transfers are governed by the appropriate safeguards required by applicable law (standard contractual clauses, etc.). [TO BE COMPLETED according to the chosen entity and jurisdiction.]

In accordance with applicable data protection law (GDPR for residents of the European Union), you have the following rights: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at support@wayoftrading.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.
The use of cookies on this site is detailed in our [Cookie Policy](/cookies).
We may update this policy. Any change will be published on this page with an updated date.
A cookie is a small text file stored on your device when you visit a website. It allows the site to function properly and, in some cases, to measure its audience.

items: **Strictly necessary cookies.** Essential for the site to function (storing your preferences, including your cookie choice). They do not require your consent and cannot be disabled.

**Analytics cookie (Google Analytics).** We use Google Analytics to understand how the site is used (pages viewed, visit duration). The corresponding cookie (_ga and related cookies) is set **only after your explicit consent** via the cookie banner. If you decline, no analytics cookie is set.

blocks.text: To date, this site sets **no advertising, remarketing or marketing-targeting cookies**. We do not share your browsing data with advertising networks.

You can accept or decline analytics cookies at any time. To change your choice, use the "Cookies" link in the footer, which re-displays the consent banner. You can also delete cookies from your browser settings.
To learn more about how we process your data, see our [Privacy Policy](/confidentialite).

The Way of Trading website and application are published by [COMPANY NAME], [LEGAL FORM with share capital of [AMOUNT]], registered under number [REGISTRATION NUMBER], with its registered office at [ADDRESS], [COUNTRY].
Publication director: [NAME].
Contact: support@wayoftrading.com.
The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. The domain name is managed through Hostinger.

All elements of the Way of Trading website and application (the "Way of Trading" / "WOT" brand, logo, the Rudy mascot, text, educational content, glossary, interface, graphic elements) are protected by intellectual property law and remain the exclusive property of [COMPANY NAME] or its licensors. Any unauthorized reproduction, representation or use is prohibited.

Way of Trading is a trading education platform. WOT does not provide investment advice, does not execute any transaction and does not manage any trading account. See our [Disclaimer](/avertissement) for details.
For any question: support@wayoftrading.com.
